TENDER NOTICE

Project Title: Diagnostic Equipment B64
Estimated Value: GBP 99,604.00
Submission Deadline: 2025-11-21T18:35:06Z

Contracting Authority:
Medical Procurement Office
Contact: medical@procurement.health

Project Description:
This is a simple healthcare project requiring professional expertise and proven experience.

Evaluation Criteria:
1. Technical Capability (66%)
2. Sustainability (13%)
3. Project Timeline (21%)

Additional Requirements:
- FDA/CE medical device certification
- HIPAA compliance mandatory
- Medical grade quality standards

Submission Instructions:
All proposals must be submitted through the designated procurement portal.
Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.
Questions regarding this tender should be directed to the contact person above.

This tender is subject to all applicable laws and regulations.
The contracting authority reserves the right to cancel or modify this tender at any time.
